deep_dive.title: SPACE: Unifying Symmetric and Asymmetric Routing Problems for Generalist Neural Solver
deep_dive.abstract: Generalist neural routing solvers have shown great potential in solving diverse vehicle routing problems (VRPs) with a unified model. However, existing solvers are typically limited to symmetric settings or degrade in performance when switching to asymmetric settings due to input inconsistencies or inherent structural differences, substantially limiting their practicality in real-world scenarios that encompass both scenarios. To address this limitation, we define the spatial position of each node based on the relative distances to a specific set of pivots and further propose a Spatial Pivot-Aligned Coordinate-free Embedding (SPACE) framework that unifies node representation and solution generation across symmetric and asymmetric VRPs. Specifically, we construct a bidirectional Frechet representation using a novel furthest pivot sampling strategy to enable invariant node representations across distinct problem settings. Furthermore, we introduce a weight-decomposed adaptive decoding mechanism that decouples geometric perception from problem representations, mitigating the overfitting of constraint decisions to a specific geometry setting. Extensive experiments on 110 VRP variants, comprising 55 symmetric problems and their asymmetric counterparts, demonstrate that SPACE achieves promising zero-shot generalization in both symmetric and asymmetric VRPs.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: unified neural solver for vehicle routing problem
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 统一的神经车辆路径问题求解器

deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 统一的神经车辆路径问题求解器
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: SPACE proposes a spatial pivot-aligned embedding to unify symmetric and asymmetric VRPs in a single neural solver.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有神经VRP求解器通常局限于对称场景，在非对称场景下性能下降。SPACE通过基于相对距离的枢轴对齐无坐标嵌入，统一了对称和非对称VRP的节点表示和求解生成，使通用神经求解器能高效处理两类问题，实验结果验证了其泛化能力。

deep_dive.title: Heterogeneous AAV Logistics Task Allocation: A Reinforcement Learning Enhanced Overlapping Coalition Formation Game Approach
deep_dive.abstract: In dynamic urban logistics, the stochastic emergence of time-sensitive tasks poses a significant optimality challenge for heterogeneous AAVs logistics task allocation. To address this problem, a reinforcement learning enhanced overlapping coalition formation game approach is proposed. A dynamic task allocation model is established, where global optimality is mathematically quantified by a generalized logistics cost coupling service quality and resource consumption. To deal with the time-varying task sets induced by stochastic order arrivals, a transformer-based soft actor-critic network is designed. By leveraging multi-head self-attention to encode variable-length logistics states and capture task-wise spatiotemporal dependencies, the learned policy adaptively guides coalition updates, replacing heuristic rules in the overlapping coalition formation game. On this basis, heterogeneous AAVs can form more efficient overlapping coalitions for dynamic logistics tasks. The resulting coalition formation process is proven to constitute an exact potential game, which guarantees convergence to a Nash-stable equilibrium within a finite number of iterations. Numerical simulations demonstrate that the proposed algorithm effectively improves the optimality of task allocation under the generalized logistics cost criterion. In a scenario with 32 AAVs and 80 tasks, our algorithm achieves a 39.76% cost reduction compared with the heuristic OCF baseline. Indoor flight experiments further validate its practicality.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: RL for heterogeneous AAV logistics task allocation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 强化学习用于异构无人飞行器物流任务分配
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 强化学习用于异构无人飞行器物流任务分配
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 强化学习用于异构无人飞行器物流任务分配
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a reinforcement learning enhanced overlapping coalition formation game approach for heterogeneous AAV logistics task allocation, using transformer-based soft actor-critic to handle stochastic orders. Shows improved optimality in dynamic urban logistics.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对动态城市物流中异构无人飞行器（AAV）的任务分配问题，提出一种强化学习增强的重叠联盟形成博弈方法。该方法建立动态任务分配模型，通过最大化最小物流成本（整合服务质量与资源消耗）来量化全局最优性，并设计基于Transformer的柔性演员-评论家网络处理时变任务集。实验表明，该方法在随机订单到达场景下能有效提升任务分配质量，具有较好的鲁棒性和可扩展性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对动态城市物流中异构无人飞行器（AAV）的任务分配问题，提出一种强化学习增强的重叠联盟形成博弈方法。该方法建立动态任务分配模型，通过最大化最小物流成本（整合服务质量与资源消耗）来量化全局最优性，并设计基于Transformer的柔性演员-评论家网络处理时变任务集。实验表明，该方法在随机订单到达场景下能有效提升任务分配质量，具有较好的鲁棒性和可扩展性。

quick_skim.title: Performance Comparison of Classical and Neural Sampling Algorithms for Robotic Navigation
quick_skim.abstract: Integrating artificial intelligence (AI) into sampling-based motion planning provides new possibilities for improving autonomous navigation efficiency. In this paper, three algorithms, namely RRT*, Neural RRT*, and Neural Informed RRT*, are implemented and evaluated on environments containing convex and concave obstacles with different obstacle densities. The obtained results indicate that neural-guided planners improve path quality, producing up to 14\% shorter paths and 55--75\% smoother trajectories compared with the conventional RRT* algorithm. Among the evaluated methods, Neural Informed RRT* achieves the best overall performance in terms of path length and trajectory smoothness. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of AI-guided sampling strategies for improving reliability and trajectory efficiency in robotic and UAV navigation, despite a slight increase in computation time. Overall, the study highlights the growing importance of artificial intelligence in real-time robotic path planning applications.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Neural RRT* for robotic path planning
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 神经RRT*用于机器人路径规划
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 神经RRT*用于机器人路径规划
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 神经RRT*用于机器人路径规划
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Compares RRT* and neural-guided versions (Neural RRT*, Neural Informed RRT*) for robotic navigation. Neural planners produce 14% shorter paths and 55-75% smoother trajectories, demonstrating AI effectiveness.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 面向机器人导航问题，对比了经典RRT*与神经引导的RRT*算法（Neural RRT*和Neural Informed RRT*）在凸/凹障碍物环境中的性能。实验表明，神经引导规划器可生成短14%、平滑度提升55-75%的路径，其中Neural Informed RRT*综合表现最优。该工作验证了AI方法在采样运动规划中的有效性，为机器人路径优化提供了新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 面向机器人导航问题，对比了经典RRT*与神经引导的RRT*算法（Neural RRT*和Neural Informed RRT*）在凸/凹障碍物环境中的性能。实验表明，神经引导规划器可生成短14%、平滑度提升55-75%的路径，其中Neural Informed RRT*综合表现最优。该工作验证了AI方法在采样运动规划中的有效性，为机器人路径优化提供了新思路。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 帮我查找使用强化学习进行末端路径优化或者区域划分的论文, especially work that connects or combines: reinforcement learning for end-effector path optimization; reinforcement learning for region partitioning; deep reinforcement learning for robotic path planning; reinforcement learning area partitioning for robotics; Reinforcement learning for end effector path optimization in robotics; Reinforcement learning based region partitioning for robotic manipulation.

quick_skim.title: Latent Representation Alignment for Offline Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning
quick_skim.abstract: Offline goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL) provides a practical framework for obtaining goal-reaching policies from fixed datasets. However, learning a reliable goal-conditioned value function in long-horizon tasks remains challenging. In this paper, we identify erroneous generalization in goal-conditioned value functions as a fundamental bottleneck, and demonstrate that appropriate inductive bias in the value function is crucial for addressing the bottleneck. Building on these findings, we propose Latent-Aligned Value Learning (LAVL), an offline GCRL algorithm that integrates latent-representation-based value generalization with hierarchical planning in a unified framework. Extensive experiments on OGBench demonstrate that LAVL consistently outperforms existing offline GCRL methods, achieving the highest performance on 20 out of 22 datasets. Notably, LAVL exhibits strong performance in long-horizon tasks and trajectory stitching datasets, where prior methods suffer significant performance degradation. Our code is available at https://github.com/oh-lab/LAVL.git.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Latent representation alignment for offline goal-conditioned RL
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 潜在表示对齐用于离线目标条件强化学习
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 潜在表示对齐用于离线目标条件强化学习
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 潜在表示对齐用于离线目标条件强化学习
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Latent-Aligned Value Learning (LAVL) for offline goal-conditioned RL, integrating latent representation alignment with hierarchical planning. Addresses erroneous generalization in value functions.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对离线目标条件强化学习中长时域任务价值函数泛化错误的问题，提出潜在对齐价值学习（LAVL）算法。该方法将基于潜在表示的泛化能力与层次规划相结合，通过引入合适的价值函数归纳偏置来缓解瓶颈。在OGBench基准上的实验表明，LAVL显著提升了长期目标到达成功率，为离线GCRL提供了有效的新框架。
